title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. arundana
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. arundana, also known as kidney vetch or arundana kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the perennial legume Anthyllis vulneraria, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, and is traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. arundana include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal disorders. Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. arundana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
